subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with clear tokens is verily the Dawning-Place of My Cause, the Dayspring of My Revelation and My Hidden Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالبینات انه لمطلع امری و مشرق وحیی و کتاب مکنونی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
